# Pull Request

<!--
    Thanks for contributing! Prepend the title with [BREAKING CHANGE] if relevant.
    Keep PRs atomic: one logical change per PR.
-->

## Description

<!--
    Describe the intent of this PR and link the issue it addresses, e.g. `fixes #18`.
    List the changes as per keepachangelog.com (Added/Changed/Deprecated/Security/Fixed/Removed).
    This should match what you added to the CHANGELOG.
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] Single logical change; unrelated/cosmetic updates are in a separate PR.
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `Unreleased` ([format](https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.0.0/)).
- [ ] `build.ps1 -ResolveDependency` builds and tests pass locally.
- [ ] Docs/comment-based help/localization updated where relevant.
- [ ] Unit/integration tests added or updated ([testing guidelines](https://dsccommunity.org/guidelines/testing-guidelines)).
- [ ] Code follows [DSC Community Style Guidelines](https://dsccommunity.org/styleguidelines).
